title: Workspace & platform level webhooks
excerpt:
Has there been any discussion regarding company/platform level webhook notifications? 
Specifically new users, new boards, and new work spaces would be nice.

posts.author: morhriveion (Robert Hollon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has there been any discussion regarding company/platform level webhook notifications?

Specifically new users, new boards, and new work spaces would be nice.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @morhriveion

As of right now, platform level webhooks aren’t on our immediate roadmap. Currently webhook integrations are limited to the board level.

With that said, I’m more than happy to share your feedback with the team! I think you could do some pretty interesting stuff with account level webhooks

-Scott
